title: boltonia asteroides var. decurrens
intro: Boltonia asteroides var. decurrens, also known as drooping false aster, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the eastern regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Boltonia asteroides var. decurrens include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and relieving digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
